eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cuyahoga, OH; at 9:00 AM on MAY 1, 2019 Effective until 9:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This a required weekly test of the Cuyahoga County EAS system. This is only a test. No action is required.
